description:
Some afternoons are meant for wandering without a destination, join me as I wander from baker street to bond street.

We stop at daunt books to get lost in the stacks, walk along the sunny Marylebone High Street, find quiet in the local churches, and end the day surrounded by the art of the Wallace Collection.

Spring in London is a gentle reminder that the city is most beautiful when you slow down to see it.

00:00 Baker Street Station
00:20 Sherlock Holmes Statue
00:50 Madame Tussuads 
01:33 St Marylebone Parish Church
03:57 Marylebone High Street / Garden of Rest
05:48 Marylebone High Street / Daunt Books
07:20 Catholic Church of St James
08:21 Wallace Collection
11:11 Selfridges / Oxford Street
12:27 Bond Street Station

#london #londonhiddengems #springinlondon #marylebone
